title: Intense Russian Toor Dal Soup
description: A tangy, quick‑fix Russian soup with tender toor dal, zesty lemon and a fiery temper.
instructions: Rinse the toor dal under cold water until the water runs clear.
In a large pot, combine the rinsed dal, 4 cups of water, and 1 cup of vegetable stock, and bring to a boil over high heat.
Reduce heat to medium and simmer, uncovered, for 20 minutes or until the dal is tender.
While the dal cooks, heat a tablespoon of olive oil in a separate saucepan over medium heat.
Add the diced onion to the saucepan and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic, ginger, and whole dried red chili, cooking for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the diced tomatoes, cumin powder, salt, and black pepper, and simmer for 10 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld.
Once the dal is cooked, add the tomato-ginger mixture to the pot and stir well.
Simmer the combined soup for an additional 5 minutes to let the flavors blend.
Finish by stirring in the lemon juice, taste, and adjust seasoning if needed before serving hot.
